description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image. Define a single job named pages that runs in the deploy stage, caches the node_modules/ directory, and executes the commands `npm install` then `npm run build-site`. After building, the job should publish the `public/` folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch. No extra services or variables are required.
